name: Collin Brown
title: Workplace Operations Manager
one_liner: I build offices, streamline operations, and keep cross-functional teams aligned — from blueprint to move-in day.
bio: I'm an operations-focused workplace generalist who manages the full lifecycle of office environments — from construction build-outs and vendor negotiations to employee experience programming and internal communications. Currently leading the multi-floor renovation of Rho's SF headquarters at 325 Pacific Ave, coordinating 15+ vendors across electrical, flooring, HVAC, AV, and millwork while hitting aggressive timelines. I also plan office events, manage supply chains, and build repeatable playbooks so future offices can launch faster.
